title: config.rs reads CA cert file before validating mutual exclusion, then discards bytes
description: Config::auth_provider() reads the CA cert file from disk unconditionally when --ca-cert is supplied, then checks whether --bearer-token or --basic-user is also set. If either is, it assigns the bytes to 'let _ = der' and returns an error. The file I/O was wasted. More importantly, a contributor adding new auth type combinations will see the pattern of 'read first, validate after' and copy it, spreading the anti-pattern. The mutual exclusion check should happen before the file read.
